summary: Rebranded /vibe-pill landing page from FounderMaxxing to The Vibe Pill identity. Changes: (1) 'Founding batch' → 'Founding 15 · 15 spots · Application only' in hero badge, (2) Hero sub-copy updated to 'Maximize your productive potential as a founder. AI fluency is the byproduct.', (3) CTA button updated to 'Apply for the Founding 15', (4) Inserted prominent 'World First' section between hero and Who Is V with the canonical line 'The course you're learning = the product you're building = the community you're fostering.' plus tagline, (5) Replaced 'The Hotline' bento card with 'Meet Zøren' — '24/7 AI concierge. Text or call anytime.' using Bot icon, (6) Added 'Founding 15 · $100/month · Rate locked forever' pricing line above the apply section, (7) Stripe CTA now reads 'Apply now — Founding 15', (8) Deleted 5 legacy foundermaxxing routes: /foundermaxxing, /foundermaxxing/admin, /api/foundermaxxing-apply, /api/foundermaxxing-coupons, /api/foundermaxxing-admin. Visual design preserved: dark theme, gold #d9ac5f accents, Source Serif 4 font, aurora glow, all animations intact.
